name: Vestiage, Inc.
summary: Vestiage, Inc., a healthy aging company, creates, acquires, markets, and distributes science-based nutraceuticals and cosmeceuticals. It offers testosterone support, growth hormone support, antioxidant and inflammation response, DHEA support, heart health, brain support, prostate health, and vitamin and mineral products for men under the RegiMEN brand name. The company also provides intimacy support, trim and energized, calm and collected, and skin health products for women under the Monterey Bay Nutraceuticals brand name. It sells its products through its retail, direct, and online distribution channels. The company was formerly known as Empire Pizza Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Vestiage, Inc. in March 2013. Vestiage, Inc. is based in Newport Beach, California.
